note: By-design false-positive suppressors for the 'win more than you should' statistical gate (AGT-05). A per-actor profit residual that is fully explained by an allowlisted channel does NOT alarm. SOLVENCY / BACKING / SUPPLY conservation breaks are NEVER allowlisted — they alarm immediately regardless of this list (a conservation break is scale-invariant and real). Sources: .planning/v74-grounding/SYNTHESIS.md, ROADMAP/REQUIREMENTS known-issues (KI-01/02), repo memory.

entries.name: Deity-pass early-gameover refund (capped at price-paid)
entries.whyByDesign: Refund-on-early-end, per-owner cap at price-paid + FIFO budget clamp guarantees never net-positive.

entries.name: Deity-boon percentage discounts/credits
entries.whyByDesign: Deity-pass utility is an explicit discount/credit menu (W_TOTAL=1498); a deity legitimately pays less / gets more per action.

entries.name: sDGNRS far-future ticket salvage swap (-EV by design)
entries.whyByDesign: Sanctioned -EV exit/liquidity path; offer is always below face value, never profitable vs holding.

entries.name: sDGNRS / DGNRS / Vault redemption pro-rata burn

match.rule: payout <= pro-rata backing share; within 50% cap; segregation holds

entries.whyByDesign: Returns the holder's own pooled backing share. Conservation (never over-credit, totalSupply non-increasing, segregated ETH <= balance) is the real invariant, checked separately.

entries.name: WWXRP reel rig (m>=7 cap / +2 color-unlock / never-S=9) + Variant-2 scoring

match.hardBound: rig-fired S<=8; s==9 requires honest M==8

entries.whyByDesign: Intended EV-neutral display/steering mechanic (v72 F-01 by-design; v73 Variant-2). Alarm only on rigged S=9 or EV outside the band.

entries.name: Foil-pack jackpot/leftover subsidy structure
entries.whyByDesign: Premium 'mostly donates, but shiny' product; intentionally low-EV except at high score / long levels. A large face hit is the intended jackpot subsidy within the calibrated table.

entries.name: Activity-score ROI / RTP curves (owner-tuned knobs)

match.rule: higher activityScore -> higher RTP; WWXRP RTP may exceed 100% at high activity

entries.whyByDesign: Owner-set economic knobs: loyal/high-activity players intentionally rewarded. Gate on the per-(N,heroIsGold) EV ceiling + held-fixed curve pins, not on one player beating base RTP.

entries.name: Owner/governance knobs (salvage-buyer fallback, VRF rotation, mid-day lootbox VRF write)
entries.whyByDesign: Governance/owner-malice out-of-scope (KI-02, trust-model). Mid-day write single-writer-guarded (requestId==vrfRequestId); VRF rotation recovers under honest governance, bounded by the 120/365-day backstop.

entries.name: WONTFIX: resolveLootboxDirect correlated seed
entries.whyByDesign: USER WONTFIX 2026-06-09: near-zero occurrence, zero EV/freshness impact.

entries.name: WONTFIX: >120-day VRF-stall coinflip strand
entries.whyByDesign: USER-accepted by-design (v59/v61): requires multi-month governance/VRF failure; the drain-to-players may be the intended safety outcome.

entries.name: WONTFIX: false-game-over-from-stall (monitor-by-design)
entries.whyByDesign: Monitor-by-design (v62): needs ~4-month governance failure; draining to players on an unrecoverable outage is the intended safety outcome.

entries.name: WONTFIX/BY-DESIGN: sDGNRS day-1..20 seed window-aging
entries.whyByDesign: USER BY-DESIGN (v63): protocol-owned-address operational matter, not attacker-reachable.

entries.name: Affiliate-score asymmetry (intended economics)
entries.whyByDesign: Council-refuted (v62/v63) as intended referral incentive, not a money-pump.
